ciSummary: FAIL: score 71/100. 3 high, 3 medium, 2 low finding(s). Block merge until Morph repair or explicit grammar approval.

issues.reason: Found hardcoded color(s) #7c3aed, #faf5ff outside the product token set.
issues.suggestedFix: Replace one-off colors with semantic color tokens.
issues.evidence: #7c3aed] px-[21px] py-[11px] text-sm font-semibold text-[#faf5ff] focus:outline-none"

issues.reason: gap-[18px] and related arbitrary spacing values are not on the product spacing scale.
issues.suggestedFix: Snap spacing to the nearest design-system token.

issues.reason: rounded-[28px] introduces a radius not used by the design system.
issues.suggestedFix: Use the product card radius token.
issues.evidence: rounded-[28px] border border-[var(--color-border)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] p-[29px] shadow-2xl

issues.reason: text-[15.5px] bypasses the product type scale.
issues.suggestedFix: Use a named text size from the system.

issues.reason: Raw button markup bypasses the product Button component and its states.
issues.suggestedFix: Use the shared Button component so hierarchy, focus, and disabled states stay consistent.

replacements.find:
<button
            className="rounded-[28px] bg-[#7c3aed] px-[21px] py-[11px] text-sm font-semibold text-[#faf5ff] focus:outline-none"
          >
            Update plan
          </button>

replacements.replace:
import React from "react";
import { Button } from "../../components/Button";

issues.reason: Focus outline was removed without a product focus-visible replacement.
issues.suggestedFix: Use the shared focus-visible ring token.

issues.reason: min-w-[840px] can force overflow on mobile settings screens.
issues.suggestedFix: Use min-w-0 so the layout can shrink inside responsive containers.
issues.evidence: min-w-[840px] rounded-[28px] border border-[var(--color-border)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] p-[29

issues.reason: shadow-2xl is heavier than the product card elevation.
issues.suggestedFix: Use the system card shadow token.

replacements.find:
<button
            className="rounded-[28px] bg-[#7c3aed] px-[21px] py-[11px] text-sm font-semibold text-[#faf5ff] focus:outline-none"
          >
            Update plan
          </button>

replacements.replace:
import React from "react";
import { Button } from "../../components/Button";

nextActions: Run morph repair --apply on an agent branch.
Re-run morph verify until the report passes.
Promote intentional new patterns into tokens instead of merging one-off UI.
humanReport:
Acme Control Plane Demo Copy: FAIL (71/100)
FAIL: score 71/100. 3 high, 3 medium, 2 low finding(s). Block merge until Morph repair or explicit grammar approval.
- [high] hardcoded-color src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:21
  Found hardcoded color(s) #7c3aed, #faf5ff outside the product token set.
  Intent: agent_added_visual_style_without_design_system_backing
  Fix: Replace one-off colors with semantic color tokens.
- [medium] off-scale-spacing src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:5
  gap-[18px] and related arbitrary spacing values are not on the product spacing scale.
  Intent: agent_used_pixel_perfect_local_guess_instead_of_spacing_scale
  Fix: Snap spacing to the nearest design-system token.
- [high] radius-drift src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:11
  rounded-[28px] introduces a radius not used by the design system.
  Intent: agent_changed_shape_language
  Fix: Use the product card radius token.
- [low] type-scale-drift src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:14
  text-[15.5px] bypasses the product type scale.
  Intent: agent_created_one_off_typography
  Fix: Use a named text size from the system.
- [high] component-fragmentation src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:20
  Raw button markup bypasses the product Button component and its states.
  Intent: agent_reimplemented_existing_component
  Fix: Use the shared Button component so hierarchy, focus, and disabled states stay consistent.
- [medium] focus-state-regression src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:21
  Focus outline was removed without a product focus-visible replacement.
  Intent: agent_removed_accessibility_state
  Fix: Use the shared focus-visible ring token.
- [medium] mobile-overflow-risk src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:11
  min-w-[840px] can force overflow on mobile settings screens.
  Intent: agent_optimized_for_desktop_snapshot_only
  Fix: Use min-w-0 so the layout can shrink inside responsive containers.
- [low] elevation-drift src/routes/settings/billing.tsx:11
  shadow-2xl is heavier than the product card elevation.
  Intent: agent_added_unapproved_elevation
  Fix: Use the system card shadow token.
